items.title: Arsenal are still Premier League title favorites, and here's why
items.summary: Arsenal suffered a huge blow to their Premier League title hopes in Sunday's 2-1 defeat at Manchester City.
items.whyItMatters: Football creates regular global sports momentum and quick-return storylines.

items.title: New NFL rule of eight minutes between first-round picks has some GMs feeling rushed
items.summary: Steelers GM Omar Khan says he'd prefer to have 10 minutes between picks in the first round.
items.whyItMatters: It adds variety to the sports mix without turning the page into a full sports wire.

items.title: How the IPL is reshaping India's talent map
items.summary: India's national team is reaping the rewards of an IPL which is now drawing talent from all over the country.
items.whyItMatters: Cricket gives XLB a stronger India-relevant sports lane and a reason for repeat sports check-ins.
